btw if you guys are wondering what upcoming wheel does (in jp at least)

on place, +1 arith cap
every turn put a (draw 1, +1 arith) card into random spot in deck
seems a lil broken
the draw that would have been a card is now this new insight card, but you get the card draw back anyway
so essentially just +1 cap  +1 arith into deck every turn
so youre getting 2 arith advantage over opponent every turn, which means wheel pays itself off in 2 turns
can also save those cards maybe
